domain_name: ICT-Enabled Citizen Accountability and Grievance Redressal

background_concepts.concept: Social audit / MGNREGA public hearings (jan sunwai)
background_concepts.why_needed: The MKSS 'Hamara Paisa, Hamara Hisab' and helpline/accountability readings assume familiarity with India's social audit movement and the MGNREGA social-audit mechanism as the institutional backdrop for citizen accountability, but do not explain how these processes work.

suggested_resources.title: A Guide to Conducting Social Audits (Accountability India)
Social Audits Overview (Government of Meghalaya State Rural Employment Society)

background_concepts.why_needed: Several of these readings apply or extend an 'applied data justice framework' and invoke visibility/(dis)engagement/anti-discrimination pillars without teaching the underlying concept of data justice they build on.

suggested_resources.title: What Is Data Justice? (Royal Roads University LibGuide)
Framing data justice: Taylor's three pillars (primer)

domain_name: Satellite Imagery for Development Measurement and Targeting

background_concepts.concept: Nighttime lights (DMSP-OLS / VIIRS) as an economic proxy
background_concepts.why_needed: These readings use night-time luminosity as a stand-in for economic activity and specific sensors (DMSP-OLS, VIIRS) without explaining how the data is collected or why brightness correlates with GDP.

suggested_resources.title: Illuminating Economic Growth Using Satellite Images (IMF Finance & Development)
Light Every Night – nighttime light data set and tools (World Bank Data Blog)

background_concepts.concept: Supervised land-cover / pixel-level classification of satellite imagery
background_concepts.why_needed: The IndiaSat, urban-slum-detection and city-evolution papers assume knowledge of supervised land-cover classification, spectral bands, and training/ground-truth workflows that they use but don't introduce.

suggested_resources.title: ARSET – Land Cover Classification with Satellite Imagery (NASA)
Introduction to LULC Mapping – Land Use Land Cover Guide

domain_name: Political Connections, Patronage, and Rent Capture

background_concepts.why_needed: The quantitative rent-capture papers estimate the causal effect of political connections using panel and difference-in-differences style designs and rely on the parallel-trends logic without explaining it.

suggested_resources.title: An Introduction to Difference-in-Difference Analysis (Tilburg Science Hub)

domain_name: Electoral Cycles in Public Service Provision

background_concepts.why_needed: Both papers exploit election timing as a natural experiment and rely on quasi-experimental estimators (RDD, DiD) whose identifying assumptions are assumed rather than taught.

suggested_resources.title: Regression Discontinuity Designs in Economics (Lee & Lemieux user guide)

background_concepts.why_needed: Min's work measures 'electricity losses' as the political manipulation variable, which requires understanding technical vs. commercial T&D loss as a metric — used without definition.

suggested_resources.title: Light Every Night – measuring energy access with nighttime lights (World Bank)

domain_name: Elite Power and Structural Inequality (Foundational Critique)

background_concepts.why_needed: The MarginalizedAadhaar documentary and related readings assume the reader knows how Aadhaar enrolment, biometric authentication, and its linkage to services work when documenting denial-of-service exclusions.

suggested_resources.title: Aadhaar: A Complete Guide to India's Unique Identification System

domain_name: ICT for Refugee and Stateless Populations
Digital delivery of social protection entitlements

background_concepts.concept: Public Distribution System (PDS) and Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT)
background_concepts.why_needed: This domain's readings assume how India's entitlement pipelines (PDS rations, DBT subsidies/pensions) authenticate and pay beneficiaries — the institutional mechanism into which authentication is inserted — without explaining it.

suggested_resources.title: Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT): JAM Trinity Explained
What Is Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT)? (Bank of Baroda)

domain_name: Technology-assisted grievance redress and citizen engagement in welfare programs
Satellite imagery and geospatial ML for governance and monitoring

background_concepts.concept: Supervised classification / semantic segmentation of satellite imagery
background_concepts.why_needed: The urban-growth monitoring, land-damage, and vessel-detection systems apply pixel-level classification and segmentation of remote-sensing imagery as a core method that is assumed rather than introduced.

suggested_resources.title: ARSET – Land Cover Classification with Satellite Imagery (NASA)
Tutorial: Remote Sensing Image Classification with QGIS (OCWGIS)
